name: PsyUS
displayDescription: Psychological counselling appointment booking platform for university students. Needed to connect students with counselors through streamlined scheduling. Features appointment booking, availability management, session tracking, and role-based access. Contains 2 parts: Next.js 16 frontend (React 19, MUI 7) and NestJS 11 + Fastify backend, backed by PostgreSQL 17 with Prisma ORM and Better Auth. Dockerized monorepo.
